title: verbesina serrata var. pringlei
intro: Verbesina serrata var. pringlei, also known as the Mexican crown flower or pringle's crown flower, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant has been used to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of Verbesina serrata var. pringlei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
